title: Fig. 2 in First Record of the Oak Gall Wasp (Hymenoptera, Cynipidae) in Myanmar
author: Alazmah, Abdulfatah

description: Fig. 2. Habitus of asexual generation wasps of Andricus mukaigawae used for DNA extraction (scale bar=1 mm). A, Specimen from Chin, Myanmar; B, Specimen from Nagano, Japan.
